title: Hylaeaicum roseum
taxonomy: Hylaeaicum roseum is classified as a genus of flowering plants in the family Iridaceae. It is native to the Himalayan region and is known for its showy, rose-pink flowers. The classification of Hylaeaicum roseum is further divided into several species, including Hylaeaicum roseum subsp. roseum and Hylaeaicum roseum subsp. himalaicum. These species can be distinguished by their flower colors and shapes, as well as their leaf characteristics. The exact classification of Hylaeaicum roseum may vary depending on the source and current botanical research.
